case_title: JUDY W NADEL VS. UNION FRENCH CLEANERS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $100.00) SERVED DEC-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNION FRENCH CLEANERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-05-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2018 BY PRO TEM DIANE PEEBLES 506. PLAINTIFF JUDY W. NADEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNION FRENCH CLEANERS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TAE WOO KIM, CO-OWNER, ASSISTED BY SUGYING YOO WHO SPEAKS BOTH KOREAN AND ENGLISH WHO IS NOT CERTIFIED. I THEREFORE ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETERS OATH TO SUGYING YOO. PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATES EDDIE KIM SERVED. AGENT FOR PROCESS SERVING IS TAE WOO KIM. DEFENDANT INDICATED "EDDIE KIM" AND "TAE WOO KIM" ARE ONE IN THE SAME PERSON AS HE GOES BY "EDDIE KIM". NO EXHIBITS RETAINED; JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
